subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-13 in Liverpool
subcodes.first_line: One should not place one's trust in such people. What he [Edward Browne] has said is of no importance to me whatsoever
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینها محل اعتماد نیستند و ابداً اهمیت ندارند در این سفر امریکا نفوسی اظهار خضوع
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
